title: Graphic designer - advertising creatives
brief: We are looking for a graphic designer to create high-performing Meta (Facebook & Instagram) ad creatives for DONE. The work will include creating static ad creatives, promotional graphics, and multiple creative variations for testing across our paid social campaigns. We are looking for someone who: * Has experience designing ad creatives for e-commerce brands * Understands performance-focused design and paid social advertising * Can create clean, modern, and conversion-focused visuals * Is comfortable working from existing brand guidelines * Can communicate and collaborate through Slack We are looking for a long-term collaboration and would like a designer who can support us with ongoing creative requests as we launch new campaigns, products, and promotions. When applying, please share examples of Meta ads, social media advertising creatives, or e-commerce design work that you have created.
